author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (BPF verifier + vfio-pci):

- kernel/bpf/verifier.md: covers kernel/bpf/verifier.c (~20K lines — largest single file in kernel/bpf/) — BPF static analyzer: per-insn safety check (load/store bounds + register tracking + helper-arg-typing), CFG construction with back-edge detection, per-path register state tracking with tnum (tristate-number per-bit known) + min/max bounds + signed/unsigned tracking, path pruning via state-equivalence (regsafe/states_equal), BTF-based PTR_TO_BTF_ID type checking, helper-call signature validation, kfunc allowlist per-prog-type, post-verification fixups (Spectre-v1 AND-MASK insertion + bpf_loop inlining), stack-overflow check (MAX_BPF_STACK=512×8frames). 12 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (verifier-termination + bounds-overflow + state-UAF + tnum-consistency) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus soundness proof (forall prog accepted ==> safe execution).
- drivers/vfio/pci-core.md: covers vfio_pci.c + vfio_pci_core.c — vfio-pci core: per-device fd lifecycle (init/register/enable/finish_enable/open_device/close_device), per-region exposure (BAR0-5 + ROM + config-space + VGA + per-vendor regions), per-region read/write/mmap with BAR-mmap caps + MSI-X-mappable iff IOMMU-validates, IRQ delivery via virqfd (DATA_EVENTFD/DATA_BOOL/DATA_NONE per-vector configuration), reset (FLR/PM-cycle/secondary-bus reset), hot-reset (atomic reset of all devices in reset-group with ownership-check), AER integration via REQ eventfd, iommufd binding (modern + legacy paths), per-vendor variant-driver hookup for live-migration. 12 REQ / 9 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + region-OOB + BAR-OOB + IRQ-vec-OOB + PM-state-validity) / Layer-2 ref to devfd_lifecycle.tla + eventfd_irq.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus DMA round-trip.

Total state: 252 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 18 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-bpf-verifier, design-drivers-vfio-pci-core.

Next iter plan: net/ipv4/tcp.md (TCP socket layer + connection state machine — most cross-referenced TCP entry-point) + drivers/usb/host-xhci.md (xHCI host controller — USB 3/4 hot path).
